title: model: support GLM-OCR
body:
Fix https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/issues/19335

Target support https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-OCR

The model is just GLM4V under the hood with some additional features (see below), the [transformers code](https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/main/src/transformers/models/glm_ocr/modular_glm_ocr.py) already reflected most of the differences:
1. Text model has one nextn MTP layer (similar to GLM4_MOE)
2. Vision model uses Q/K norm, no learned positional embeddings

GGUF: to be uploaded...
